3639283182.title: Dear Cherie Newborn and Baby Care Soft Hairbrush and Comb Kit for Daily Grooming and Cradle Cap Care (3 Piece Set)
3639283182.detail_text: Tender strokes for your baby's first hair. Dear Mama, caring for your baby’s first hair is a delicate, tender act - and we’re here to help make each stroke gentler. Your Baby Hairbrush & Comb Kit was designed to bring ease and comfort to these little moments of care. With a soft bristle brush to smooth, a round-tooth comb that glides without tugging, and a silicone cradle cap brush that loosens flakes without bending or hurting, all are thoughtfully made with your baby’s delicate scalp in mind. Because every stroke is more than grooming. It’s a tender act of love woven into your everyday routine. Little Touches • Soft bristles: Glide smoothly through fine hair without tugging or pulling, helping you brush with confidence and ease. • Rounded teeth protect delicate skin: Smooth, rounded tips to protect delicate skin while gently guiding knots apart. • Gentle on newborn scalps: Gentle enough for the earliest days, turning everyday grooming into a calm, fuss-free moment for both you and your little one. Packed With Care 1 soft bristle hair brush 1 round-tooth comb 1 silicone cradle cap brush Notes On Use 1. Use on dry hair for daily brushing and styling. 2. Brush gently with the soft bristle brush or detangle with the round-tooth comb to avoid any pulling or tugging. 3. For cradle cap, apply a small amount of baby oil, leave for 10–15 minutes, then gently loosen flakes with the silicone brush and comb through. Caring Tips • Wash tools with warm water and mild soap. • Air dry fully before storing to prevent rust or damage. • Store in the provided case, in a clean and dry place. • Keep away from direct sunlight and damp conditions. Gentle Reminders Always brush gently. Avoid pressing too hard on the scalp. If irritation or discomfort occurs, discontinue use and consult your care provider. Common Concerns & Gentle Fixes Q) Is it safe to comb baby's hair? A) It’s perfectly safe to comb your baby hair, but the tools you use make all the difference. Your little one’s scalp and fine hair are delicate, and using stiff or harsh tools can cause discomfort, hair breakage, or scratches. Our hairbrush & comb set is soft, baby-friendly, and designed specifically for newborns, ensuring every stroke is gentle and soothing. Q) Is there a need to comb my baby's hair? A) Combing your baby’s hair isn’t strictly necessary, but it can be really helpful. Starting early allows your little one to get used to the feeling of having their hair brushed, which can make them less fussy about it as they grow. Over time, these calm, familiar moments naturally become part of your daily routine. Gentle brushing can also support cradle cap care, helping to loosen dry, flaky skin in a soft, soothing way. Q) At what point would my baby need a brush and comb? A) Some babies are born with a full head of hair, while others have just a little, and both are completely normal. You can start combing their hair whenever it feels appropriate. The key is to use gentle, baby-safe tools that make grooming safe and effortless. Soft, carefully designed brushes and combs made specifically for infants, like ours, ensure that each grooming session is calm, comfortable, and a simple part of your daily routine.
3639283182.detail_html:
Tender strokes for your baby's first hair.

Dear Mama, caring for your baby’s first hair is a delicate, tender act - and we’re here to help make each stroke gentler. 

Your Baby Hairbrush & Comb Kit was designed to bring ease and comfort to these little moments of care. With a soft bristle brush to smooth, a round-tooth comb that glides without tugging, and a silicone cradle cap brush that loosens flakes without bending or hurting, all are thoughtfully made with your baby’s delicate scalp in mind. Because every stroke is more than grooming. It’s a tender act of love woven into your everyday routine.

Little Touches

• Soft bristles: Glide smoothly through fine hair without tugging or pulling, helping you brush with confidence and ease.

• Rounded teeth protect delicate skin: Smooth, rounded tips to protect delicate skin while gently guiding knots apart.

• Gentle on newborn scalps: Gentle enough for the earliest days, turning everyday grooming into a calm, fuss-free moment for both you and your little one.

Packed With Care

1 soft bristle hair brush

1 round-tooth comb

1 silicone cradle cap brush

Notes On Use

1. Use on dry hair for daily brushing and styling.

2. Brush gently with the soft bristle brush or detangle with the round-tooth comb to avoid any pulling or tugging.

3. For cradle cap, apply a small amount of baby oil, leave for 10–15 minutes, then gently loosen flakes with the silicone brush and comb through.

Caring Tips

• Wash tools with warm water and mild soap.

• Air dry fully before storing to prevent rust or damage.

• Store in the provided case, in a clean and dry place.

• Keep away from direct sunlight and damp conditions.

Gentle Reminders

Always brush gently. Avoid pressing too hard on the scalp.

If irritation or discomfort occurs, discontinue use and consult your care provider.

Common Concerns & Gentle Fixes

Q) Is it safe to comb baby's hair?

A) It’s perfectly safe to comb your baby hair, but the tools you use make all the difference. Your little one’s scalp and fine hair are delicate, and using stiff or harsh tools can cause discomfort, hair breakage, or scratches. Our hairbrush & comb set is soft, baby-friendly, and designed specifically for newborns, ensuring every stroke is gentle and soothing.

Q) Is there a need to comb my baby's hair?

A) Combing your baby’s hair isn’t strictly necessary, but it can be really helpful. Starting early allows your little one to get used to the feeling of having their hair brushed, which can make them less fussy about it as they grow. Over time, these calm, familiar moments naturally become part of your daily routine. Gentle brushing can also support cradle cap care, helping to loosen dry, flaky skin in a soft, soothing way.

Q) At what point would my baby need a brush and comb?

A) Some babies are born with a full head of hair, while others have just a little, and both are completely normal. You can start combing their hair whenever it feels appropriate. The key is to use gentle, baby-safe tools that make grooming safe and effortless. Soft, carefully designed brushes and combs made specifically for infants, like ours, ensure that each grooming session is calm, comfortable, and a simple part of your daily routine.

3639118279.detail_text: Gentle care for little teeth and tender gums. Dear Mama, even the tiniest teeth deserve your care - and we're here to make tending to them gentle and full of love. Your Baby Oral Cleaning Kit will help you care for little teeth and tender gums as they grow, with a soft bristle finger brush to clean and massage and a tongue cleaner to freshen and remove milk coating. Made to brush, soothe, and freshen, it makes oral care simple from the very start and builds healthy habits that last a lifetime. Every clean becomes more than care. It’s a tender act of love that nurtures their smile, bringing comfort, ease, and healthy habits as they grow. Little Touches • Extra-soft bristles: Gentle care for your baby’s delicate gums, emerging teeth, and tongue. • Durable, easy to clean: Made from high-quality silicone, the brush and tongue cleaner are long-lasting, hygienic, and simple to rinse. • Supports healthy oral care habits early: Introduces gentle, positive oral care from day one, laying the foundation for strong teeth and making daily cleaning a calm, familiar habit for your little one. Packed With Care 1 silicone finger toothbrush 1 silicone tongue cleaner Notes On Use 1. Use the finger toothbrush to gently clean teeth and massage gums. 2. Use the tongue cleaner to remove milk stains or coating on the tongue. 3. Recommended from birth. Caring Tips • Wash tools with warm water and mild soap after each use. • Sterilise before first use, and occasionally thereafter. • Air dry fully before storing. • Store in the provided case, in a clean and dry place. • Keep away from direct sunlight and damp conditions. • Replace every 3-4 months, or sooner if worn. Gentle Reminders For use under adult supervision only. Do not use as a pacifier or teether. Common Concerns & Gentle Fixes Q) How often should I clean my baby’s gums mouth? A) A little daily care goes a long way. Gently clean your baby’s gums, teeth, and tongue at least twice a day, ideally after each feed and before bedtime, to remove milk residue and prevent buildup. This simple routine helps build healthy oral habits early, keeping your little one’s mouth feeling fresh, comfortable, and well cared for. Q) When can I start using a toothbrush on my baby? Can I use it even before teeth appear? A) You can start caring for your baby’s mouth from day one. Even before teeth appear, gently massaging the gums with a silicone finger brush helps keep the mouth clean and introduces healthy oral habits early. Starting this gentle routine now lays the foundation for strong, healthy teeth and can help prevent early dental issues down the road. As your baby’s first teeth begin to emerge, the same tools make it easy to ease them into a calm, familiar brushing routine. Q) Do I need to use toothpaste with the finger toothbrush for babies? A) For initial gum cleaning, using a finger toothbrush with just water is perfectly sufficient. Once those first teeth begin to appear, usually between 6 and 18 months, you can introduce a tiny smear of fluoride-free or age-appropriate toothpaste, about the size of a grain of rice. If you’re ever unsure, you can always check with your dentist for guidance on timing and the best toothpaste for your little one.
3639118279.detail_html:
Gentle care for little teeth and tender gums.

Dear Mama, even the tiniest teeth deserve your care - and we're here to make tending to them gentle and full of love. 

Your Baby Oral Cleaning Kit will help you care for little teeth and tender gums as they grow, with a soft bristle finger brush to clean and massage and a tongue cleaner to freshen and remove milk coating. Made to brush, soothe, and freshen, it makes oral care simple from the very start and builds healthy habits that last a lifetime. Every clean becomes more than care. It’s a tender act of love that nurtures their smile, bringing comfort, ease, and healthy habits as they grow.

Little Touches

• Extra-soft bristles: Gentle care for your baby’s delicate gums, emerging teeth, and tongue.

• Durable, easy to clean: Made from high-quality silicone, the brush and tongue cleaner are long-lasting, hygienic, and simple to rinse.

• Supports healthy oral care habits early: Introduces gentle, positive oral care from day one, laying the foundation for strong teeth and making daily cleaning a calm, familiar habit for your little one.

Packed With Care

1 silicone finger toothbrush

1 silicone tongue cleaner

Notes On Use

1. Use the finger toothbrush to gently clean teeth and massage gums.

2. Use the tongue cleaner to remove milk stains or coating on the tongue.

3. Recommended from birth.

Caring Tips

• Wash tools with warm water and mild soap after each use.

• Sterilise before first use, and occasionally thereafter.

• Air dry fully before storing.

• Store in the provided case, in a clean and dry place.

• Keep away from direct sunlight and damp conditions.

• Replace every 3-4 months, or sooner if worn.

Gentle Reminders

For use under adult supervision only.

Do not use as a pacifier or teether.

Common Concerns & Gentle Fixes

Q) How often should I clean my baby’s gums mouth?

A) A little daily care goes a long way. Gently clean your baby’s gums, teeth, and tongue at least twice a day, ideally after each feed and before bedtime, to remove milk residue and prevent buildup. This simple routine helps build healthy oral habits early, keeping your little one’s mouth feeling fresh, comfortable, and well cared for.

Q) When can I start using a toothbrush on my baby? Can I use it even before teeth appear?

A) You can start caring for your baby’s mouth from day one. Even before teeth appear, gently massaging the gums with a silicone finger brush helps keep the mouth clean and introduces healthy oral habits early. Starting this gentle routine now lays the foundation for strong, healthy teeth and can help prevent early dental issues down the road. As your baby’s first teeth begin to emerge, the same tools make it easy to ease them into a calm, familiar brushing routine.

Q) Do I need to use toothpaste with the finger toothbrush for babies?

A) For initial gum cleaning, using a finger toothbrush with just water is perfectly sufficient. Once those first teeth begin to appear, usually between 6 and 18 months, you can introduce a tiny smear of fluoride-free or age-appropriate toothpaste, about the size of a grain of rice. If you’re ever unsure, you can always check with your dentist for guidance on timing and the best toothpaste for your little one.

page_json.name: Dear Cherie Baby Care Basics Kit
page_json.description: *Colour selection applies only to the Baby Oral Cleaning Kit. All other items in the bundle come in standard colours.*Everyday baby care, from the earliest daysDear Mama, caring for your baby doesn’t come with a manual. It unfolds through small, everyday moments. This kit was created to support those first routines, when you’re learning your baby’s cues and finding your own rhythm together.Inside, you’ll find thoughtfully chosen essentials that help you care for your baby gently and confidently. From keeping little mouths clean, to trimming tiny nails safely, to soothing sensitive skin, each item is designed to make daily care feel calmer, simpler, and less overwhelming.No complicated routines. Just gentle, everyday care for growing little needs.What's included:1. Baby Hairbrush & Comb Kit (3 Piece Set)2. Baby Nail Trimmer Kit (4 Piece Set)3. Baby Oral Cleaning Kit (2 Piece Set)4. Nasal Care & Clear Aspirator Nose Sucker5. Baby Fever Relief Cooling Gel Patch (Box of 6)6. Baby Medicine No-Mess Dose Pacifier

283382917.title: Haakaa Baby Nail Care Kit
283382917.detail_text: HAAKAA BABY NAIL CARE KIT The Haakaa Baby Nail Care Kit lets you safely trim down your baby's nails without the need for sharp scissors! Simply attach the trimmer pad suitable for your child's age and gradually file down their nails! The trimmer pads make your baby's nails smooth and don't leave sharp edges that may scratch their delicate skin. We've also included a metal pad and cone so parents can file down their nails too! Safe nail filing for soft and developing nails. Five grinding pads varying in strength. Pressure-activated arrest system to prevent injury. Two rotation directions and speeds. Suitable for children and adults Nail Trimmer Age Guide Pink Pad: 0-3 months Blue Pad: 3-6 months Green Pad: 6-12 months Orange Pad: 12 months+ Metal Pad: 12 months+ Metal Cone: 12 months+ Cleaning and CareCaution: Clean this product by wiping gently with a soft, dry cloth or cotton swab. Do not use any abrasive cleaners, thinners or benzine to clean this product. Keep in a cool, dry place and avoid direct sunlight. The polishing pads will need to be replaced as the pads become worn. Caution This product contains small parts that may become a choking hazard. Keep this product out of the reach of children. Do not use rechargeable batteries in this product. Do not use this product for anything other than its intended use. Do not hold the rotating attachment to any part of the body for extended periods of time as this may cause friction burns. Do not place directly onto skin. We do not recommend using this product on nails that are weak, damaged, diseased or brittle. Batteries not included. Requires 2 x AA batteries. Do not throw out theclear insert inside the Baby Nail Care Kit Container, as it holds all of the attachmentsin place during storage. Haakaa Friendly Whale Nail Care Set The Haakaa Friendly Whale Nail Care Set lets you safely trim down your baby’s nails without the need for sharp scissors or clippers! The adorable ergonomic whale trimmer, in soft oceanic colours, makes nail care time more fun than ever. It has a pressure-activated arrest system, so it is safe for even the tiniest nails. Our Nail Care Set has two rotation directions and speeds to suit your needs. It is whisper quiet and features soft LED lights for easy nighttime filing. Simply attach the trimmer pad suitable for your child’s age and gradually file down their nails. The trimmer pads gentle smooth your baby’s nails without leaving sharp edges that may scratch their delicate skin. And best of all, the Haakaa Friendly Whale Nail Care Set is suitable for everyone from newborns to moms and dads, making it the perfect gift for the whole family! Features: Pressure-activated arrest system to prevent injury Easy-to-use, one-button operation with indication lights Choose between two rotation directions and speeds Ergonomically designed whale shape is easy to hold Whisper quiet with soft LED lights at the front for discreet nighttime trimming Includes a range of high-quality filing pads suitable from newborn to adult Portable, neatly-organized storage case with convenient age guide Product Inclusions: 1 x Electric Nail Trimmer Body 5 x Nail Trimmer Pads (0-3m, 3-6m, 6-12m, 12m+, adult) 1 x Nail Trimmer Cone 1 x Storage Case Requires 2 x AA Batteries (not included)
283382917.detail_html:
HAAKAA BABY NAIL CARE KIT

The Haakaa Baby Nail Care Kit lets you safely trim down your baby's nails without the need for sharp scissors!

Simply attach the trimmer pad suitable for your child's age and gradually file down their nails! The trimmer pads make your baby's nails smooth and don't leave sharp edges that may scratch their delicate skin. We've also included a metal pad and cone so parents can file down their nails too!

Safe nail filing for soft and developing nails.

Five grinding pads varying in strength.

Pressure-activated arrest system to prevent injury.

Two rotation directions and speeds.

Suitable for children and adults

Nail Trimmer Age Guide

Pink Pad: 0-3 months

Blue Pad: 3-6 months

Green Pad: 6-12 months

Orange Pad: 12 months+

Metal Pad: 12 months+

Metal Cone: 12 months+

Cleaning and CareCaution:

Clean this product by wiping gently with a soft, dry cloth or cotton swab.

Do not use any abrasive cleaners, thinners or benzine to clean this product.

Keep in a cool, dry place and avoid direct sunlight.

The polishing pads will need to be replaced as the pads become worn.

Caution

  • This product contains small parts that may become a choking hazard.
  • Keep this product out of the reach of children.
  • Do not use rechargeable batteries in this product.
  • Do not use this product for anything other than its intended use.
  • Do not hold the rotating attachment to any part of the body for extended periods of time as this may cause friction burns.
  • Do not place directly onto skin.
  • We do not recommend using this product on nails that are weak, damaged, diseased or brittle.

Batteries not included. Requires 2 x AA batteries. Do not throw out theclear insert inside the Baby Nail Care Kit Container, as it holds all of the attachmentsin place during storage.

Haakaa Friendly Whale Nail Care Set

The Haakaa Friendly Whale Nail Care Set lets you safely trim down your baby’s nails without the need for sharp scissors or clippers! The adorable ergonomic whale trimmer, in soft oceanic colours, makes nail care time more fun than ever. It has a pressure-activated arrest system, so it is safe for even the tiniest nails. 

Our Nail Care Set has two rotation directions and speeds to suit your needs. It is whisper quiet and features soft LED lights for easy nighttime filing.

Simply attach the trimmer pad suitable for your child’s age and gradually file down their nails. The trimmer pads gentle smooth your baby’s nails without leaving sharp edges that may scratch their delicate skin. And best of all, the Haakaa Friendly Whale Nail Care Set is suitable for everyone from newborns to moms and dads, making it the perfect gift for the whole family!

Features:

  • Pressure-activated arrest system to prevent injury
  • Easy-to-use, one-button operation with indication lights
  • Choose between two rotation directions and speeds
  • Ergonomically designed whale shape is easy to hold
  • Whisper quiet with soft LED lights at the front for discreet nighttime trimming
  • Includes a range of high-quality filing pads suitable from newborn to adult
  • Portable, neatly-organized storage case with convenient age guide 

Product Inclusions:

  • 1 x Electric Nail Trimmer Body
  • 5 x Nail Trimmer Pads (0-3m, 3-6m, 6-12m, 12m+, adult)
  • 1 x Nail Trimmer Cone
  • 1 x Storage Case

Requires 2 x AA Batteries (not included)

• For baby's delicate skin and hair

• Tear free formula gently cleanses and keeps baby’s delicate skin and hair hydrated without drying.

• Dermatologist tested and clinically proven to be gentle on sensitive skin

Simply pour cleanser into your hand or washcloth and gently massage over baby’s hair and body to lather, then rinse and lightly towel dry.

Ideal for everyday use

With skin-gentle ingredients you can feel good about, like calendula, this nourishing baby wash is an ideal part of your baby’s regular care routine.

3162054024.detail_html:
Sebamed Baby Protective Facial Cream is to protect baby's delicate facial skin with extra mild care and also provide relief for irritation caused by saliva. It has a protective mositurising complex with Allantoin and Hyaluron that helps to prevent dryness. Panthenol also helps to safeguard against irritation. The pH 5.5 promotes the development of the skin's acid mantle. 

  • Safeguards against harmful environmental influences
  • Soothes and regenerates irritated skin
  • Protective moisturizing complex with Allantoin and Hyaluron helps to prevent dryness
  • Panthenol helps to safeguard against irritation
  • Non-occlusive and provides effective hydration to prevent dryness
  • The pH 5.5 promotes the development of the skin's acid mantle
  • Free from nitro-mochus compounds, formaldehyde, nitrosamines and dioxan
  • Easy to apply and readily absorbed oil-in-water emulsion
  • Dermatologically and clinically tested

Net Volume: 50ml

Recommended for babies 6 months to 3 years 

Healthy skin has a biological slightly acidic surface called the acid mantle. The delicate skin of a newborn is lacking this protective acid mantle, which is established during the first few months of life. Only if the skin has a pH value of 5.5, it is able to safeguard against the penetration of pathogenic micro-organisms and harmful environmental influences. The natural protective function helps to prevent dehydaration, irritation and allergies. Baby Sebamed has been especially formulated to consolidate the resistance of baby's skin. The pH 5.5 promotes the development of the skin's acid mantle.

Ingredients

Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetyl Palmitate, Glycerin, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Propylene Glycol Dicaprylate/Dicaprate, PEG-20 Methyl Glucose Sesquistearate, Tocopheryl Acetate, Panthenol, Squalane, Sodium Hyaluronate, Allantoin, Sodium Cetearyl Sulfate, Methyl Glucose Sesquistearate, Citric Acid, Dimethicone, Sodium Carbomer, Sodium Hydroxide, Parfum, Phenoxyethanol, Sorbic Acid.

Directions

Apply cream to the hands and massage it gently into baby's delicate facial skin

If it gets into your baby's eyes, rinse with water. PRODUCTS WARNINGS •Always read the label. •Follow the directions for use. For external use only. •Avoid contact with eyes. aiTexts: Cetaphil Baby Moisturizing Daily Care Lotion and Calendula Wash & Shampoo are specially formulated for delicate baby skin.
The lotion contains organic calendula, shea butter, sunflower seed oil, and vitamin E to soothe, soften, and moisturize for up to 24 hours.
Both products are hypoallergenic, mineral oil free, dermatologist tested, and safe for newborns and toddlers.
The wash & shampoo features a tear-free formula with glycerin and panthenol to gently cleanse hair and body without drying.
Easy to use: lotion is applied after bath, wash & shampoo lathers gently and rinses clean, helping protect and nourish sensitive skin daily.

BABY DAILY LOTION 400ML

-Suitable for nourishing baby's delicate skin, perfect to use after bath time.

-hypoallergenic, mineral oil free and dermatologically tested.

-Suitable For: Face & Body

-Product Claims: 0% Paraben, Mineral oils, animal origin ingredients.

•Baby face and body lotion

•Contains Glycerin

•Formulated with Shea Butter

BABY DAILY LOTION WITH ORGANIC CALENDULA AND SUNFLOWER SEED OIL 400ML

-Formulated with organic calendula to soothe plus sweet almond oil, sunflower oil, and Vitamin E to soften and smooth skin.

-Dermatologist tested and clinically proven to be gentle on sensitive skin.

-Skin type: For baby's delicate skin

- Specially designed to moisturize and protect baby’s sensitive skin from dryness.

- Moisturizes baby’s delicate skin for 24 hours

DIRECTION OF USE LOTION # Pour baby lotion into your hand. Rub both hands together to warm lotion. Gently apply to baby's face and body. If it gets into your baby's eyes, rinse with water.

CETAPHIL BABY GENTLE WASH AND SHAMPOO WITH SHEA BUTTER 400ML

-Enriched with glycerin and panthenol to help nourish without drying or damaging your baby's delicate skin

-Tear-free, hypoallergenic formula rinses clean, leaving a soft fragrance.

-Gentle enough for newborn's and baby's skin.

-0% Paraben, Mineral oils, animal origin ingredients.

-Suitable For: Hair and body

•For newborn & infant skin

•With glycerin and panthenol to help nourish without drying or damaging baby's delicate skin

CETAPHIL BABY WASH & SHAMPOO WITH ORGANIC CALENDULA AND SUNFLOWER SEED OIL 400ML

-Tear free 2-in-1 formula blends into a rich lather

-Formulated with organic calendula extract, derived from the marigold flower, to help soothe, moisturize and soften sensitive skin while leaving a fresh scent.

-Dermatologist tested and clinically proven to be gentle on sensitive skin.

-Suitable For: Hair and body

DIRECTION OF USE WASH & SHAMPOO # Pour into hand or wash cloth and apply to hair and body. Lather, rinse and towel dry. If it gets into your baby's eyes, rinse with water.

CETAPHIL BABY MOISTURIZING BATH & WASH 400ML

-Provide 5 areas of protection – gentle, soft, hypoallergenic, moisturising, soothing.

•Gentle enough for newborns and babies with delicate skin

•Enriched with 1/3 of baby lotion to care for even the most delicate skin

•Contains glycerine, panthenol, the building blocks for strengthening the skin barrier

DIRECTIONS OF USE BATH & WASH

•For bath pour directly into running water.

•For baby wash, pour directly onto wash cloth and apply to body. If it gets into your baby's eyes, rinse with water.

PRODUCTS WARNINGS

•Always read the label.

•Follow the directions for use. For external use only.

•Avoid contact with eyes. If it goes into the eye rinse thoroughly.

13703582502.detail_html:
1. CETAPHIL BABY WASH & SHAMPOO WITH ORGANIC CALENDULA: Gently cleanses and keeps baby’s delicate skin and hair hydrated without drying

2. SOOTHES AND SOFTENS THE SKIN: Formulated with organic calendula extract, derived from the marigold flower, to help soothe, moisturize and soften sensitive skin while leaving a fresh scent.

3. PROTECTS BABY'S SKIN FROM DRYNESS: 2-in-1 formula blends into a rich lather to gently cleanse your baby’s delicate skin and hair leaving it soft and clean

4. DESIGNED FOR BABY'S SENSITIVE SKIN: The hypoallergenic, paraben free formula is suitable for newborns and clinically proven to be gentle on sensitive skin

5. PAEDIATRICIAN RECOMMENDED. TRUSTED BY MUMS.

6. 5 FOLD PROTECTION FOR YOUR BABY'S SKIN: Gentle, soothing, moisture seal, hypoallergenic and supports their natural skin barrier

CETAPHIL BABY Wash & Shampoo with Organic Calendula is a gentle, tear free 2-in-1 formula that blends into a rich lather to gently cleanse your baby’s delicate skin and hair leaving it soft and clean while also retaining moisture. Formulated with organic calendula extract, derived from the marigold flower, to help soothe, moisturize and soften sensitive skin while leaving a fresh scent. The hypoallergenic and paraben free formula is suitable for newborns, dermatologist tested and clinically proven to be gentle on sensitive skin. Give your baby's skin 5 fold protection with CETAPHIL: gentle, soothing, moisture seal, hypoallergenic and supports their natural skin barrier.

How to use:

Wet hair and skin with water. Pour into hand or wash cloth and gently massage over hair and body to lather, then rinse. If it gets into your baby's eyes, rinse with water.

Caution: For external use only.

Storage Instruction: Store below 30 degrees C

3180431373.title: Sudocrem Gentle Moisturizing Nappy Cream 125g for Sensitive Baby Skin
3180431373.detail_text: Nappy discomfort is one of the most common skin conditions of your baby’s early life. It is an irritation of the skin anywhere in the nappy area. While it might be sore for your baby, the good news is that it is rarely serious. Nappy discomfort most often affects your baby’s sensitive skin when there is prolonged contact with urine or stools. Your baby’s bottom may have red patches or the whole area may be red. The skin may look sore and can feel hot to touch. If your baby is suffering from discomfort, you can use Sudocrem Nappy Cream to help soothe and treat your baby’s skin. The very best way to deal with nappy discomfort however is to prevent your baby getting it in the first place. These steps will help: Change wet or soiled nappies as soon as possible.
